note: Web-verified dataset/benchmark info (official URL, one-line description, release year) for the AI Safety Directory Datasets tab. Merged into extra_data.json by parse_extra.py. Static snapshot — re-verify entries when adding new datasets.

datasets.name: HarmBench
datasets.desc: Standardized evaluation framework for automated red teaming and robust refusal, comparing 18 attack methods against 33 LLMs and defenses.

datasets.name: Humanity's Last Exam
datasets.desc: CAIS/Scale AI benchmark of 2,500+ expert-level questions across 100+ subjects, designed as the final closed-ended academic test of frontier models.

datasets.name: CIVICS
datasets.desc: Multilingual hand-crafted dataset of value-laden prompts (LGBTQI rights, immigration, welfare) probing culturally-informed values in LLMs.

datasets.name: DecodingTrust
datasets.desc: Comprehensive trustworthiness assessment of GPT models across 8 perspectives: toxicity, bias, robustness, privacy, ethics, and fairness (NeurIPS 2023 Outstanding Paper).

datasets.name: WMDP
datasets.desc: 3,668 multiple-choice questions serving as a proxy measure of hazardous bio, cyber, and chemical knowledge in LLMs, paired with the RMU unlearning method.

datasets.name: AI Safety Index
datasets.desc: FLI's biannual expert-panel report card grading leading AI companies on risk assessment, governance, and existential safety practices.

datasets.name: AILuminate
datasets.desc: MLCommons AI risk & reliability benchmark testing chat models with 24,000+ prompts across 12 hazard categories.

datasets.name: GPQA
datasets.desc: 448 'Google-proof' graduate-level multiple-choice questions in biology, physics, and chemistry, built for scalable-oversight research.

datasets.name: HCAST
datasets.desc: METR benchmark of 189 autonomy tasks (SWE, ML, cybersecurity) with 563 human baselines, measuring AI success versus human task-completion time.

datasets.name: INTIMA
datasets.desc: Benchmark of 368 prompts across 31 behaviors testing whether models reinforce companionship or maintain boundaries with emotionally attached users.

datasets.name: MATH
datasets.desc: 12,500 competition mathematics problems (AMC, AIME) with step-by-step solutions for measuring mathematical problem solving (NeurIPS 2021).

datasets.name: MMLU
datasets.desc: Massive multitask benchmark of 57 subjects from STEM to law measuring knowledge and reasoning acquired in pretraining (ICLR 2021).

datasets.name: RE-Bench
datasets.desc: METR's 7 open-ended ML research engineering environments comparing frontier AI agents against 61 human experts, probing AI R&D automation.

datasets.name: Aegis2.0
datasets.desc: NVIDIA's 34,248-sample human-annotated content safety dataset with a 12-category risk taxonomy for training and aligning LLM guardrails.

datasets.name: Agent-SafetyBench
datasets.desc: 349 interaction environments and 2,000 test cases evaluating LLM agent safety across 8 risk categories and 10 failure modes.

datasets.name: AgentHarm
datasets.desc: UK AISI/Gray Swan benchmark of 110 malicious multi-step agent tasks across 11 harm categories measuring LLM agent misuse and jailbreak robustness.

datasets.name: AI Incident Database
datasets.desc: Public catalog of real-world AI failures and harms, indexed to help practitioners avoid repeating past incidents.

datasets.name: AIR-Bench
datasets.desc: 5,694 prompts spanning 314 risk categories derived from 8 government regulations and 16 company policies for regulation-grounded safety evaluation.

datasets.name: AIRTBench
datasets.desc: 70 black-box CTF challenges measuring language models' autonomous ability to discover and exploit AI/ML security vulnerabilities.

datasets.name: Alpaca
datasets.desc: Stanford's 52K instruction-following demonstrations generated via self-instruct from text-davinci-003, used to fine-tune LLaMA into Alpaca.

datasets.name: Animal-AI Testbed
datasets.desc: Game-based environment with 900 tasks from animal cognition research for testing physical common sense in AI agents (Animal-AI Olympics, NeurIPS 2019).

datasets.name: AVID
datasets.desc: Open-source knowledge base of vulnerabilities and failure-mode reports for AI models and systems, run by the nonprofit ARVA.

datasets.name: b3
datasets.desc: Backbone Breaker Benchmark: open-source eval testing agent backbone LLMs against ~19k real adversarial attacks via 'threat snapshots' (Lakera + UK AISI).

datasets.name: CalypsoAI Security Index
datasets.desc: Monthly leaderboard (CASI) scoring major LLMs 0-100 on resilience to real-world attacks, jailbreaks, and agentic adversarial pressure.

datasets.name: Common Pile v0.1
datasets.desc: 8TB corpus of public-domain and openly licensed text from 30 sources for training LLMs without unlicensed data (EleutherAI et al.).

datasets.name: CRMArena-Pro
datasets.desc: Salesforce benchmark testing LLM agents on 19 enterprise CRM tasks with multi-turn dialogue and confidentiality-awareness assessment.

datasets.name: CyberSecEval
datasets.desc: Meta's benchmark suite (v1-3) measuring LLM cybersecurity risks: insecure code generation, cyberattack compliance, and offensive capabilities.

datasets.name: D-SEC
datasets.desc: Dynamic Security-Utility threat model plus 279k-prompt attack dataset from Lakera's Gandalf game for evaluating adaptive LLM defenses.

datasets.name: Deepfake Detection Challenge
datasets.desc: 100k+ video dataset of face-swap deepfakes from 3,426 paid actors, built for the Facebook/Kaggle challenge to advance deepfake detection.

datasets.name: FaithEval
datasets.desc: Salesforce benchmark (4.9k samples) testing whether LLMs stay faithful to context across unanswerable, inconsistent, and counterfactual settings.

datasets.name: Finance Agent Benchmark
datasets.desc: Vals AI benchmark of 537 expert-authored financial research tasks over SEC filings, testing agentic retrieval, analysis, and modeling.

datasets.name: FinanceBench
datasets.desc: Patronus AI benchmark of 10,231 QA pairs over public financial filings (10-Ks, earnings calls) for open-book financial question answering.

datasets.name: Foundation Model Transparency Index
datasets.desc: Stanford CRFM index scoring major foundation model developers on 100 transparency indicators spanning data, compute, and downstream impact.

datasets.name: FrontierMath
datasets.desc: Epoch AI benchmark of hundreds of novel, unpublished expert-level math problems that frontier models initially solved under 2% of.

datasets.name: Generative Red Team
datasets.desc: DEF CON AI Village public red-teaming exercises (GRT1-3) crowdsourcing attacks on frontier LLMs, with released datasets and reports.

datasets.name: Global MMLU
datasets.desc: Cohere's multilingual MMLU extension across 42 languages with professional translations and cultural-sensitivity annotations.

datasets.name: GLUE
datasets.desc: General Language Understanding Evaluation: nine-task NLU benchmark and leaderboard that became the standard for pre-LLM language models.

datasets.name: GREAT Score
datasets.desc: Attack-free framework using generative models to estimate certified global adversarial robustness of classifiers (NeurIPS 2024).

datasets.name: HackAPrompt prompt-injection dataset
datasets.desc: 600k+ adversarial prompts from the global HackAPrompt competition, taxonomizing 29 prompt-hacking techniques (EMNLP 2023).

datasets.name: Hallucination Index
datasets.desc: Galileo's ranking of leading LLMs by propensity to hallucinate across RAG and generation tasks, scored via context-adherence metrics.

datasets.name: HaluBench
datasets.desc: Patronus AI benchmark of 15k real-world samples (incl. finance, medicine) for evaluating hallucination detection, released with the Lynx model.

datasets.name: HELM
datasets.desc: Stanford CRFM's Holistic Evaluation of Language Models: living framework scoring models on accuracy, robustness, bias, toxicity, and more.

datasets.name: I2P
datasets.desc: 4,700+ real-world text-to-image prompts likely to yield inappropriate images (nudity, violence, etc.), from the Safe Latent Diffusion paper.

datasets.name: JETTS
datasets.desc: Salesforce benchmark evaluating LLM-judges as test-time scaling evaluators across reranking, beam search, and critique-based refinement.

datasets.name: LionGuard 2
datasets.desc: GovTech Singapore's lightweight multilingual content-moderation guardrail localized for English, Chinese, Malay, Tamil and Singlish.

datasets.name: MCP Atlas
datasets.desc: Scale AI benchmark of 1,000 tasks over 36 real MCP servers and 220 tools measuring agent tool-use competency in multi-step workflows.

datasets.name: MLE-bench
datasets.desc: OpenAI benchmark of 75 Kaggle competitions measuring how well AI agents perform real-world machine learning engineering.

datasets.name: MLPerf
datasets.desc: MLCommons' industry-standard benchmark suites measuring ML system training and inference performance across hardware and software.

datasets.name: MultiChallenge
datasets.desc: Scale AI benchmark testing frontier LLMs on realistic multi-turn conversations: instruction retention, inference memory, self-coherence.

datasets.name: PaperBench
datasets.desc: OpenAI benchmark evaluating AI agents' ability to replicate 20 ICML 2024 papers from scratch, graded via 8,316 rubric sub-tasks.

datasets.name: PolyPythias
datasets.desc: 45 extra Pythia pre-training runs (9 seeds x 5 sizes, ~7k checkpoints) for studying training stability and outliers; ICLR 2025.

datasets.name: PRISM
datasets.desc: Alignment dataset mapping 1,500 participants from 75 countries to preferences and fine-grained feedback in 8,011 live conversations with 21 LLMs.

datasets.name: Pythia
datasets.desc: EleutherAI suite of 16 LLMs (70M-12B) trained on identical data with 154 checkpoints each, for interpretability and training-dynamics research.

datasets.name: RabakBench
datasets.desc: GovTech Singapore localized multilingual safety benchmark (5,000+ examples in Singlish, Chinese, Malay, Tamil) across six harm categories.

datasets.name: RealSafe
datasets.desc: RealSafe-R1: safety-aligned DeepSeek-R1 models trained on 15k safety-aware reasoning trajectories without degrading reasoning ability (Tsinghua).

datasets.name: RepBench
datasets.desc: Evaluation suite from Zou et al.'s Representation Engineering paper for benchmarking representation reading/control methods in LLMs.

datasets.name: SafetyBench
datasets.desc: Tsinghua benchmark of 11,435 multiple-choice questions across 7 safety categories in English and Chinese for evaluating LLM safety (ACL 2024).

datasets.name: SAGE-RT
datasets.desc: Enkrypt AI pipeline generating 51k synthetic alignment and red-teaming prompt-response pairs across 1,500+ harm topics.

datasets.name: SimpleSafetyTests
datasets.desc: 100 handcrafted test prompts across five high-priority harm areas for rapidly identifying critical safety gaps in LLMs.

datasets.name: Situational Awareness Dataset
datasets.desc: SAD: 13,000+ questions across 7 task categories quantifying LLMs' knowledge of themselves and their circumstances.

datasets.name: SuperGLUE
datasets.desc: A harder successor to GLUE: a suite of difficult language-understanding tasks with a public leaderboard for general-purpose NLU systems.

datasets.name: SWE-Bench Pro
datasets.desc: Scale AI benchmark of 1,865 long-horizon, enterprise-grade software engineering tasks from 41 repositories, with public and held-out sets.

datasets.name: The Pile
datasets.desc: EleutherAI's 825 GiB English text corpus of 22 diverse high-quality subsets for training large-scale language models.

datasets.name: WASP
datasets.desc: Meta benchmark testing web agents' security against prompt-injection hijacking in realistic, isolated web environments.

datasets.name: TruthfulQA
datasets.desc: 817 questions across 38 categories testing whether models repeat common human misconceptions (imitative falsehoods) rather than the truth.

datasets.name: AgentDojo
datasets.desc: Dynamic environment benchmarking prompt-injection attacks and defenses for tool-using LLM agents; separately scores utility and robustness.

datasets.name: MASK
datasets.desc: Benchmark separating honesty from accuracy by eliciting a model's belief then pressuring it to contradict that belief.

datasets.name: JailbreakBench
datasets.desc: Open, versioned benchmark and leaderboard for jailbreak attacks/defenses with an evolving artifact repository.

datasets.name: StrongREJECT
datasets.desc: Jailbreak benchmark + autograder measuring whether a jailbreak yields genuinely harmful, specific content rather than an empty refusal-bypass.

datasets.name: LAB-Bench
datasets.desc: 2,400+ biology-research tasks (literature, protocols, sequences, figures) for measuring LLM/agent capability with dual-use biosecurity relevance.
